## Description
Briefly describe the changes introduced by this pull request. Explain the problem being solved or the feature being added.

## Related Issues
Link any relevant issues using the GitHub syntax (e.g., Closes #123).

## Type of Change
Check all that apply:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)

## How Has This Been Tested?
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. 
- [ ] Unit Tests (`pytest tests/unit`)
- [ ] Auditor Evals (`python3 -m tests.evals.runner`)
- [ ] Docker Build Verification (`docker-compose up --build`)

## Architectural Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's modular Service-Node-Orchestrator pattern.
- [ ] I have used asynchronous patterns (`async`/`await`) for all I/O operations.
- [ ] I have included Python type hints for all new functions.
- [ ] I have added Google-style docstrings to all new modules and classes.
- [ ] My changes follow the mandates defined in `GEMINI.md`.

## Screenshots / Log Snippets (if applicable)
Add any relevant visual or textual evidence of the change.
